tags.name: Gunung Janing
tags.note: Some sites pointed this coordinates as Gunung Janing Barat which is incorrected. Gunung Janing Barat is about 100m lower and resided to the west of G. Janing.
tags.source:ele: Signboard and elevation by ground survey
Surveyor General Federation of Malaya Series L7010 Sheet 108 Kuala Rompin 1961
